notes_md:
**Đồng hồ** means *watch* or *clock* — something that tells time. It can be small and worn on your wrist, or big and hung on a wall.

It’s a countable noun, usually with **chiếc** or **cái**: *một chiếc đồng hồ*.  
Common pairings: **đồng hồ đeo tay** (wristwatch), **đồng hồ treo tường** (wall clock), **đồng hồ báo thức** (alarm clock).

Vietnamese uses the same word for both *watch* and *clock*, so the type is understood from context or added words.

translation.en: I need to buy a new clock.
I look at the clock on the wall.

notes:
Đồng hồ means watch or clock — something that tells time. It can be small and worn on your wrist, or big and hung on a wall.

It’s a countable noun, usually with chiếc or cái: một chiếc đồng hồ.  
Common pairings: đồng hồ đeo tay (wristwatch), đồng hồ treo tường (wall clock), đồng hồ báo thức (alarm clock).

Vietnamese uses the same word for both watch and clock, so the type is understood from context or added words.

example.vi: Tôi mua một chiếc đồng hồ mới.

definitions.es: Un dispositivo utilizado para medir e indicar el tiempo.
definitions.en: A device used to measure and indicate time.
definitions.vi: Một thiết bị dùng để đo và chỉ thời gian.

exampleSentences: Anh mua một chiếc đồng hồ mới để đeo mỗi ngày.
Chị thường nhìn đồng hồ khi cần biết mấy giờ.
Em để quên đồng hồ ở nhà nên không biết thời gian.
exampleSentencesTranslated: He bought a new watch to wear every day.
She often looks at her watch when she needs to know the time.
I forgot my watch at home so I don't know the time.
